description: Manual ground truth for planta_74 — Stage 1.5 Micro Truth Gate. Asserts FOUR rooms (SALA DE ESTAR, SUITE 02, BANHO 02, COZINHA) exist with sane geometry, opening counts, and architectural adjacencies. Polygon-perfect IoU and full-plant coverage are still out of scope here; that's a future Stage. Cycle 7 expansion (2026-05-07) added the three new rooms.

rooms.label: SALA DE ESTAR
notes: SALA DE ESTAR is the most stable room in planta_74:
- Always carries the porta-vidro to TERRACO SOCIAL.
- Integrated layout, no door arcs internally to confuse the
detector with phantom-de-arc-radius dupes.
- Polygon area calibrated 2026-05-06 at 10.75 m² (pre-PR
feature/micro-truth-gate). Range 8-25 absorbs detector
noise + future canonicalization tweaks.
Update procedure: bump schema_version on breaking changes;
expand range only with a PR that explains the cause.

rooms.label: SUITE 02
notes: Master suite of planta_74. Calibrated 2026-05-07 at 32.03 m²,
polygon=28 pts, 4 openings touching, adjacents detected as
[A.S., BANHO 02, COZINHA, TERRACO TECNICO]. The BANHO 02
adjacency is the strongest architectural invariant (master
bath inside master suite) and is the only one asserted here.
Range 15-40 absorbs detector noise + canonicalization.

rooms.label: BANHO 02
notes: Master bath. Calibrated 2026-05-07 at 6.24 m², polygon=14 pts,
3 openings touching (incl 1 with decision='debug'), adjacents
detected as [LAVABO, SUITE 01, SUITE 02]. Only the master-suite
adjacency (SUITE 02) is asserted here as the architectural
invariant; LAVABO/SUITE 01 likely come from polygon-overlap
noise of SUITE 01's oversized 69 m² polygon (known issue).

rooms.label: COZINHA
notes: Kitchen. Calibrated 2026-05-07 at 11.34 m², polygon=14 pts,
1 opening touching (interior_passage to SUITE 02 — detector
currently mislabels the cozinha↔A.S. door's room context).
expected_adjacent_labels intentionally omitted: the only
detected adjacency (SUITE 02) is architecturally implausible,
and the architecturally correct A.S./SALA DE JANTAR adjacency
is missing from the detector. Restore once the room-context
classifier reaches cozinha (likely Cycle 6 or downstream).
